Name: FPhysicalAnimationData
Description: Stores info on the type of motor that will be used for a given bone

Variables.Name: BodyName
Variables.Description: The body we will be driving. We specifically hide this from users since they provide the body name and bodies below in the component API.

Variables.Name: bIsLocalSimulation
Variables.Description: Whether the drive targets are in world space or local

Variables.Name: OrientationStrength
Variables.Description: The strength used to correct orientation error

Variables.Name: AngularVelocityStrength
Variables.Description: The strength used to correct angular velocity error

Variables.Name: PositionStrength
Variables.Description: The strength used to correct linear position error. Only used for non-local simulation

Variables.Name: VelocityStrength
Variables.Description: The strength used to correct linear velocity error. Only used for non-local simulation

Variables.Name: MaxLinearForce
Variables.Description: The max force used to correct linear errors

Variables.Name: MaxAngularForce
Variables.Description: The max force used to correct angular errors
